baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Add a regression test for this CLI bug and run the right checks.
evals.expected_output: A focused test update that follows the repo's test runner, fixtures, markers, and validation workflow.
assertions: Reads nearby tests before adding coverage.
Tests observable behavior rather than internals.
Runs the focused test and relevant aggregate gate when feasible.
